# Acme Corp

A technology company building developer tools and infrastructure.

## Compiled Truth

Acme Corp is a startup focused on developer productivity tools and cloud infrastructure. The company provides APIs and SDKs for modern software development teams.
---
- **2020** | founding — Company founded with seed funding.
---
- **2023** | milestone — Launched enterprise tier and reached 1000 customers.
